name: Spectral-Informed Neural Networks Outperform Spectral Methods in High-dimensional PDEs
summary: arXiv:2607.13566v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: For low-dimensional problems ($d\leq3$), spectral methods can achieve exceptionally high accuracy. For middle-dimensional problems ($4 \leq d \less...
description: arXiv:2607.13566v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: For low-dimensional problems ($d\leq3$), spectral methods can achieve exceptionally high accuracy. For middle-dimensional problems ($4 \leq d \lesssim 10$), spectral methods remain feasible through specific techniques such as sparse grids or hyperbolic cross. However, for high-dimensional problems ($d\gg 10$), spectral methods suffer frome the c...
author: Tianchi Yu, Ivan Oseledets
